provisions.title: Short title.
provisions.content: This Act may be called the All-India Services Act, 1951.

provisions.title: Definition.
provisions.content:
In this Act, the expression "an All-India Service" means the service known as the Indian Administrative Service or the service known as the Indian Police Service, 1[or any other service specified in section 2A].

[Footnote] 1. Ins. by Act 27 of 1963, s. 2.

provisions.title: Other All-India Services.
provisions.content:
1[2A. Other All-India Services.--With effect from such date as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint in this behalf, there shall be constituted the following All-India Services and different dates may be appointed for different services, namely:-- 1. The Indian Service of Engineers (Irrigation, Power, Buildings and Roads); 2. The Indian Forest Service; 3. The Indian Medical and Health Service.]

[Footnote] 1. Ins. by s. 3, ibid.

provisions.title: Continuance of existing rules.
provisions.content: All rules in force immediately before the commencement of this Act and applicable to an All-India Service shall continue to be in force and shall be deemed to be rules made under this Act.
